title: ProjectBuildComplete Property, Spel Class
description: Returns the status of the current project build.
examples:
If m_spel.ProjectBuildComplete Then lblBuild = "Project build is Complete"
Else lblBuild = "Project build is not Complete"
End If

if (m_spel.ProjectBuildComplete) lblBuild.Text = "Project build is Complete";
else lblBuild.Text = "Project build is not Complete";
